SECRET_KEY_BASE.description: Rails secret key for signed cookies and session tokens. Must be identical across auth and CRM services.

JWT_SECRET_KEY.description: JWT signing secret for core service token validation. Must match SECRET_KEY_BASE.

DOORKEEPER_JWT_SECRET_KEY.description: OAuth2 JWT signing secret for Doorkeeper. Must match SECRET_KEY_BASE.

ENCRYPTION_KEY.description: Fernet base64-encoded 256-bit key for encrypting stored API credentials. Must be identical across services.

EVOAI_CRM_API_TOKEN.description: Service-to-service authentication token for internal API calls between EvoAI services.

BOT_RUNTIME_SECRET.description: Shared secret for CRM to authenticate with bot-runtime service.

FRONTEND_URL.description: Public URL of the frontend application

RAILS_LOG_TO_STDOUT.description: Enable structured JSON logging to stdout (set to 'true' in Docker)

DB_HOST.description: Core service database host (use 'postgres' in Docker)

DB_SSLMODE.description: PostgreSQL SSL mode (disable, require, verify-ca, verify-full)

EVOLUTION_BASE_URL.description: CRM service URL for Evolution API integration

EVO_AUTH_BASE_URL.description: Auth service URL for core service authentication

AI_PROCESSOR_URL.description: Agent processor service URL for AI task offloading

POSTGRES_CONNECTION_STRING.description: Full PostgreSQL connection string for processor service (postgresql://user:pass@host:port/db)

HOST.description: HTTP server bind host for processor service

PORT.description: HTTP server port for processor and core services

LISTEN_ADDR.description: HTTP server bind address for bot runtime service (use '0.0.0.0:8080' in Docker)

VITE_API_URL.description: CRM API URL accessed by browser (localhost in dev, container name in Docker)

VITE_AUTH_API_URL.description: Auth service API URL accessed by browser

VITE_EVOAI_API_URL.description: Core service API URL accessed by browser

VITE_AGENT_PROCESSOR_URL.description: Agent processor URL accessed by browser
